name: ANG Credit Solutions
description_short: ANG Credit Solutions challenges negative items on credit reports through dispute processes with credit bureaus and creditors, charging flat monthly fees starting at $99.
description_long:
ANG Credit Solutions is a credit repair company based in Houston, Texas that specializes in disputing inaccurate or negative items on consumer credit reports. The company positions itself as a faster, more efficient alternative to DIY credit repair, leveraging years of experience in credit evaluation and consumer rights advocacy. Their core business model centers on working directly with credit bureaus and creditors to challenge negative reporting items that impact credit scores.

The company offers three primary service phases: initial free credit consultation and analysis, active dispute and challenge work using applicable law, and ongoing account monitoring with real-time progress tracking. They handle documentation preparation for various credit agencies and provide clients with 24/7 mobile access to monitor improvements. All services are performed on a flat monthly fee basis starting at $99, with explicit claims of no hidden fees and no long-term binding contracts.

ANG Credit Solutions differentiates itself through its guarantee structure—promising "results or your money back"—and emphasis on transparent, reasonable pricing compared to hourly attorney rates. The company emphasizes that while credit repair is technically something consumers could do themselves, ANG accelerates results and prevents costly errors. Their approach combines document preparation, creditor negotiation, and bureau dispute management into a bundled service model.

A key caveat is that the company's website provides limited detail about success rates, average timelines, or specific dispute methodologies. While they claim extensive experience and guarantee results, no independent verification, client testimonials, or regulatory compliance documentation is visible on their public-facing website. As with all credit repair firms, consumers should understand that federal law prohibits guaranteed outcomes, making the "results or money back" guarantee legally questionable.

In the broader ecosystem of credit repair services, consumers have multiple paths to improving their credit. Professional credit repair companies can dispute inaccurate items with all three bureaus, while credit monitoring services provide ongoing alerts about changes to your reports. For those building credit from scratch, secured credit cards and credit builder loans offer structured approaches. Consumers dealing with overwhelming debt may benefit from debt consolidation loans to simplify payments, or credit counseling through nonprofit agencies for personalized budgeting guidance. Consumers who successfully repair their credit often find better rates on installment loans, secured credit cards, and other financial products.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.

pros: Low entry price starting at $99/month with no hourly billing model
Explicitly states no hidden fees and no long-term binding contracts required
Offers free initial consultation and credit analysis before commitment
Provides 24/7 mobile account access for real-time progress monitoring
Handles all documentation preparation for credit agencies and bureaus
Money-back guarantee for results claimed on website
Texas-based with physical address listed (505 N. Sam Houston Parkway East, Suite 442, Houston, TX 77060)
cons: Website lacks specific success rates, case studies, or verified client testimonials
No timeline provided for typical dispute resolution or credit score improvements
Limited transparency on what qualifies as 'results' under their guarantee policy
No information about company licensing, certifications, or regulatory oversight visible
Federal law prohibits guaranteed credit repair results, making stated guarantee potentially misleading
best_for: Consumers with negative items on credit reports seeking professional dispute assistance
People wanting to avoid DIY dispute processes and potential costly errors
Those looking for flat-fee credit repair without hourly attorney expenses
diagnosis: ANG Credit Solutions is appropriate for consumers with inaccurate or legitimate negative items on credit reports who want professional dispute assistance at flat monthly rates. However, consumers should verify their legitimate dispute rights independently and understand that no credit repair company can legally guarantee specific score improvements or timeline results.
services: Dispute and challenge of negative report items with credit bureaus
Real-time credit report and score monitoring
24/7 mobile account access for progress tracking
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
